rows.description: to ye Ballance of last years Acct:
rows.notes: Consensus on amount. Selected gemini-flash's description matching image ('Acct:'), where gpt-5-mini missed the colon. gpt-5-mini's note on ink flourish was helpful in confirming fraction.
Consensus on amount. Adopted gemini-flash's empty description as per schema for amounts positioned in numeric columns. gpt-5-mini's note on ink quality was helpful for understanding challenges.
Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms shillings '00'. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read '06' for shillings despite noting fainter digits, which seems to contradict its own reading confidence.
Selected gpt-5-mini's amount as visual verification confirms shillings '10'. gemini-flash incorrectly read '00' for shillings, and its note 'shilling amount '00' is clear' was inaccurate.

rows.description: Summa omn. Solutorum
rows.notes: Consensus on both description and amount, both extractors are correct. Visual verification confirms fraction '¾'.

rows.description: unde Deductis Receptis quæ erant —
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms shillings '01' and pence '07'. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read '11' and '09' respectively, despite its note on faint ink.

rows.description: rest. Debet. Jno Hectori & petend. è Thes.
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms pounds '192', pence '00', and fraction '¾'. gpt-5-mini's reading of pounds, pence, and fraction was incorrect, despite its detailed note on faintness.

rows.description: NB. The Sum due was 3.18.0. ten Shill. therefore. to add to ye Totula next year Due to ye Rector.
rows.notes: Combined two logical lines from image into one header row. Amounts are correctly empty. Selected gemini-flash's accurate transcription of the note, correcting 'Shills' to 'Shill.' from image, as gpt-5-mini's transcription had several inaccuracies. Classified as 'header' as it's a meta-note.
rows.section_header: NB. The Sum due was 3.18.0. ten Shill. therefore. to add to ye Totula next year Due to ye Rector.
